tools.name: ruff
tools.run_command: uv run ruff check ci/ tests/ ntb/
tools.fix_command: uv run ruff check --fix ci/ tests/ ntb/

tools.name: ruff-format
tools.run_command: uv run ruff format ci/ tests/ ntb/
tools.fix_command: uv run ruff format ci/ tests/ ntb/

tools.name: hadolint
tools.run_command: wget -O hadolint https://github.com/hadolint/hadolint/releases/download/v2.12.0/hadolint-Linux-x86_64 && chmod +x hadolint && find . -name 'Dockerfile*' | xargs ./hadolint --config ./ci/hadolint-config.yaml

linting.notes: Linting is comprehensive with ruff for Python, pyright for type checking, yamllint for YAML, and hadolint for Dockerfiles. Pre-commit hooks managed by prek.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses pyfakefs for filesystem mocking, pytest fixtures
testing.notes: Container tests (tests/containers/) require --image=<image> parameter and are excluded by default. Browser tests use Playwright (TypeScript). Go tests in scripts/buildinputs/. Markers: openshift, cuda, rocm, buildonlytest.

gating_checks.name: code-static-analysis
gating_checks.command: yamllint + hadolint + JSON validation + kustomize check

gating_checks.name: build-notebooks
gating_checks.command: Builds changed notebook images using Makefile and podman

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request and push events. Uses Python 3.14, Go from scripts/buildinputs/go.mod, and Node.js 20 for browser tests. Codecov integration for coverage reporting.

build.build_command: make <target> for notebook images, or container builds
build.notes: Uses uv 0.10.6 (pinned in uv.toml). Python 3.14. Makefile handles notebook image builds. Browser tests use pnpm. The ./uv wrapper script ensures correct uv version.

conventions.import_style: Standard Python imports, with type-checking imports in if TYPE_CHECKING blocks
conventions.notes: Uses pytest markers for categorizing tests (openshift, cuda, rocm, buildonlytest). Coverage tracking with pytest-cov. Code formatting with ruff (120 char line length).

lint_commands.command: uv run ruff check ci/ tests/ ntb/

test_commands.notes: PASSED - 15 passed, 1 failed (Makefile issue), 935 subtests passed. The Makefile failure is due to gmake/make environment issue, not a test problem.

container_recipe.notes: Container tests require --image parameter. Go tests need Go installation. Browser tests need Playwright/Node.js environment. The Makefile has issues running in basic containers (expects gmake and specific environment).

results.notes: All dependencies installed successfully including pytest, ruff, pyright, coverage, testcontainers, kubernetes, etc.

results.command: uv run ruff check ci/ tests/ ntb/
results.notes: Ruff linting successful with no issues

results.output_snippet: === 1 failed, 15 passed, 10 skipped, 1 warning, 935 subtests passed in 1.92s ===
results.notes: Tests mostly passed. 1 failure is in test_make_disable_pushing due to Makefile/gmake environment issue, not a real test failure. 935 subtests passed successfully.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (ruff passed, pyright passed), tests OK (15 passed, 935 subtests passed, 1 Makefile-related failure)

gaps: Container tests (tests/containers/) require --image parameter with actual built images - cannot run without built container images
Browser tests (tests/browser/) require Playwright + Node.js environment - separate from Python tests
Go tests (scripts/buildinputs/) require Go toolchain - not present in Python container
Makefile has issues running in standard containers (expects gmake, specific environment variables) - make test fails
Some tests marked with 'openshift', 'cuda', 'rocm' markers require specific infrastructure
Manual tests in tests/manual/ are not automated
